code:
import io
import string

let line = io.read_line()
mut text = ""
match line
when Some(s)
  text = s
when None
  text = ""
end

let n = string.len(text)
mut i = 0
mut sum = 0
mut stop = false
mut cur = ""
mut has = false

while i < n and not stop
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(text, i)
  mut b = 0
  match b_opt
  when Some(v)
    b = v
  when None
    b = 0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9
    if has
      match string.parse_int(cur)
      when Some(v)
        if v < 0
          stop = true
        else
          sum = sum + v
        end
      when None
        sum = sum
      end
      cur = ""
      has = false
    end
  else
    cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    has = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has and not stop
  match string.parse_int(cur)
  when Some(v)
    if v < 0
      stop = true
    else
      sum = sum + v
    end
  when None
    sum = sum
  end
end

println("partial=#{sum}")
